item.title: Wisconsin VS Musk 3-30-2025
item.description:
The building that Unelected Official and African immigrant, Elon Musk, is inside interfering with the April 1st election by bribing Wisconsin to vote in favor of ending Social Security, medicade, other cuts that will benefit the rich. If Schimel wins April 1 then he will support unelected official and African immigrant, Elon Musk's, restructuring of the government to gain tax cuts for himself. To prevent this vote Susan Crawford April 1 in Wisconsin
A few days after the April 1 Wisconsin election there will be a Nationwide protest April 5 against unelected official, and African immigrant, Elon Musk's restructuring of the government to benefit tax cuts for the rich and ending social security.

item.title: Monday JUICY MEME Dump #412
item.description:
1. but this annoying person in red keeps blocking the view!!!
2
3
4. Legit mastermind
5. Idiot in a BMW, what could go wrong?
6. Idiot with a gun, what could go wrong (Safe for life, don't worry)
7. When your dump gets 37 upvotes
8
9
10. Me vs. Hot People
11. Trying to get shit done on Monday be like
12. I wouldn't mess with a seagull but you do you
13. You picked the wrong day to F with me mothefucker
14. Dog navigating a field
15. As an indie dev, can confirm I mean what else are you supposed to write when you have like 50 different roles during development? Animation: Me Modeling: Me Coding: Me PR: Me Making coffee: Me Anyway, if you enjoy my dumps perhaps you would also enjoy my comedy wacky narrative game that I'm working on. Only 17 days until release!!! You can wishlist on Steam if you like :) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Peak Performance
item.dc:creator: NSFWfrontpage2

item.title: Took two tries to get the 278.2nd eromeme album up. But it's worth the second attempt.
item.description:
Gotta do what I can, when I can, where I can, who I can. As usual, no eromeme OC here, just things I found here. On the internet.
Quack
It's DrBees!
Big topic: It's consent again. Last week, some things were said in my comments and in private messages to me that tell me this is a topic we need to visit a little more. Consent does not just mean "yes means go." Consent means "yes means go, for now." Conesnt means 4 yes's and a no means "stop right fucking now". Consent means "informed." If you lied or misled someone to get consent, you *do not have consent*. Consent means "capable." If they are out of sorts, drunk, high, emotionally vulnerable, being pressured out of fear for something direct or implied, *you do not have consent.* I am doing my best to remain gender neutral here because there are a ton of stereotypes about men v women and consent. And there's a lot more happening on the gender spectrum now that wasn't acknowledged when those stereotypes developed. But to be direct, men and women are both sexually objectified. Men and women both get forced into situations where they cannot consent because of one reason or another. Just because she's your wife (or gf, has done it with someone else, has done it with you before, or even is a proud flag-carrying slut) doesn't mean she doesn't get to say no. Just because "guys always want to fuck" (or is hard, or is being offered a threesome, or "should want it because every guy wants to fuck their hot teacher/boss") doesn't mean *he* doesn't get to say no. And it doesn't matter where you or they are on the gender scale, *all of this* applies to everyone. We all have the right to say NO at any point before or during sexual activities regardless of gender, or expectations, or prior agreement of consent. If you see or hear "No", or are pushing someone into a position where they can't express it safely, and you take advantage of them, that is assault. Be better. Do the right thing. Listen to your partner, don't abuse your position or station, don't lie to get laid. And if you see something, say something. We only move forward as a people if we do it all together, arm in arm. Album link to come later.
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: What Happened Today #59
item.description: “Third term.” $6 trillion. War-fighting bases. Molotovs. Authoritarians don’t pause. They escalate. Trump’s team leaked strike plans over Signal, dangled third-term fantasies, and proposed tariffs that they said were the size of a quarter of the U.S. economy—all while attacking lawyers, lying to the public, and cozying up to a dictator who just tried to erase Ukraine’s leader. Read today’s post. Then light it up. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS 1. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/30/trump-third-term 2. https://apnews.com/article/yemen-houthi-rebels-us-airstrikes-israel-hamas-war-1f8bbca1e301124d417678d8276e7cd9 3. https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/mar/31/greenland-donald-trump-us-plans-pm-jens-frederik-nielsen 4. https://www.politico.eu/article/france-belgium-scoff-at-anti-dei-policy-letter-from-donald-trump-administration/ 5. https://www.euronews.com/2025/03/30/iran-rejects-direct-negotiations-with-us-and-requests-proof-that-it-can-build-trust 6. https://madison.com/news/state-regional/article_e3f48a78-7f85-5be6-8a76-49126f868151.html 7. https://www.spokesman.com/stories/2025/mar/30/trump-aide-says-tariffs-will-raise-6-trillion-as-w/ 8. https://www.abqjournal.com/news/article_b2ea1f1c-5933-403b-8035-2dafcabaa79e.html 9. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5222295-trump-angry-putin-russia-ukraine/ 10. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/30/goldberg-waltz-signal-chat-leak/82729482007/ 11. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/30/lankford-inspector-general-signalgate-00259657 12. https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/hegseth-calls-japan-indispensable-face-chinese-aggression-rcna198811 13. https://www.sfchronicle.com/bayarea/article/trump-sf-law-firm-20248685.php

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.28 A BIRD IN THE HAND
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Danny Galieote
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Seven Light Years - RJD2 YouTube: https://youtu.be/IwRdbrUxrp4?si=xHvAcWbOggPJITZs Spotify:https://open.spotify.com/track/7qZ7FCFg2B9Vov8h9Ji2LK?si=731c2f8bd33840d8
OVA.ht.st
dres13
Mark Gleason
myeong_si_ (X)
xiaobaosu
Larry Elmore
First Lensman by E. E. Smith
Can Dice
Nickie Zimov
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
Hey, it's yours truly, ironically generated by Meta AI. *waits for a deluge of AI complaints*

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1316 (friendly insults and jibes)
item.description:
Happy Trans Visibility Day! Let's get this bread.
I can't remember for the life of me why I screenshot this.
Me, every night.
This doesn't work in my building: everything is digital, but maybe it will work for you?
Anchisaurus.
The Creation Museum goes WAY HARDER than it needs to, and this is like something that would happen in my DnD world.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [kissy noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.

item.title: For today only these Trans Memes I've pilfered can be seen with the naked eye. (Happy Trans Day of Visibility)
item.description:
Evening to all my Girlies, Boyo's and Beans, I'm back with another dump of Memes for Trans Femme, Trans Masc and Non descript entities as well as some general shenanigans and transphobe mocking. Freshly stolen from the high seas. While I try to be inclusive, please keep in mind that some of these may reflect my own experience as Trans Femme and is not intended to invalidate other's experiences.
*stares at the "centrists"*
My apologies for the size, it looked bigger when I stole it :|
The Boob envy is always real.
Honestly that last panel is how I felt after my makeup lesson. Like "Holy shit, this is me?"
They know what they did...
this is every other post in /r/Asktransgender and /r/trans
So uh... where would one theoretically find this video?
Shork Witch! Shoooooork Witch!
:3
Still need a stool for the high shelves.
For the Amazons who are self conscious out there... I will take all the tall hugs plz
The Bois at the start of their Journey
Chasers, Chasers everywhere... I hear so many horror stories.
This one is just here for @BiNorwayBoy
How it feels sometimes when seeing trans girl tuesday posts or spying another girly in your comments.
Probably bigger than his too...
Right option both adds more direct damage and probably would be better for shaping and stuff...
Feels like that with imgur shitposters too sometimes :3
Is it weird I get the same feeling HAVING to wear a bra as I do ripping it off my body at the end of the day?
I kinda want one tbh that looks yummy
Gimme!
Otis is a steer but has udders. Some think this is a mistake. But for others it's representation.
Revolutionary Girl Utena(1997), an anime about a girl (Utena) who decided at an early age to become a "Prince" and to seek the guy who inspired this change. Not romantically; Utena just wants to find him!
From there sword fights, magic, and a variety of sexualities come together in a wild clash of ideas and symbols so dense people have been writing about it for decades.
The creator has said that all interpretations of the themes and symbolism of this work are valid. So if you see a trans and/ or LGBT+ egg in the starting post, there is one. This said, one thing people in general agree on is that this is a deconstruction of the "Magical Girl" genre. Revolutionary Girl Utena even, arguably, deconstructs itself by the end.
It's technically called ANYWHERE BUT THE USA
They are also the same person :D
I will be at my first year officially on the 28th of April, I haven't made a ton of progress yet but it's still been quite a ride.
Representation is important and needs to be supported whenever possible.
:D
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
Noir Tax, This is his new favorite spot because he can just cuddle my head and purr all day while I work/play.
item.dc:creator: MelodyLightfoot

item.title: Update! There are 4 baby!
item.description:
Everyone is doing great. Chanel is being a great mom. She said it was okay for me to pick up baby but if they make a squeak she’s like GIVE BACK. Pierre is being a great baby-daddy-uncle-brother. He is also protective and love baby.
So teeny and perfect
Vera has joined the collection.
And Prada.
Dior was on my first post
Donatella was also earlier Imgurians have asked how to help my fosters. We are always in need of supplies! Here is a wishlist if you’d like to send some our way. :) https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/1CWKEHIN8OBJP?ref_=wl_shar
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: And i thought i was too old to transition

2 years!
Something like 5 years ago
About 2 weeks ago Its never too late. I tramsitioned at 33

item.title: CIS man, veteran, father of 5 boys in Texas. See below so you’ll see what I’m teaching the future
item.description:
The day is coming! I will NOT standby as they snatch people off the streets!
This is the tool we use when the courts fail us or he declares martial law. This gun fights for gay/trans/black/brown/ Asian/ Canadian/ Mexican/greenlander godammit the list is long. I am a proud ALLY! Go ahead musky, put me on a list, but send a battalion!
item.dc:creator: chrismsanders

item.title: Diversity in the Muslim community
item.description: Eid al fitr" is currently taking place for Muslims. These are holidays after Ramandan. This video with the diversity of the Muslim community made me very happy and I wanted to share it with you. And even if we have reason to be happy now. We should also think of the people who are suffering. If you can please donate to trusted charities for Palestine, Thailand and Myanmar. Asalamu Alaikum!
item.dc:creator: IslamExplained

item.title: booty shorts
item.dc:creator: AspenAbove

item.title: It's not gonna get any better
item.description: MV edit: to the people digging through my past posts for "evidence" or whatever - you're wasting your time. I lived abroad for almost all of my 20s. I'm not wealthy but I have other resources and connections abroad that make this pretty doable. Chill. Over the next few weeks we will get the pets' records in order and figure out what to do with our real estate and vehicles, then choose a destination. If anyone else has reached this point, would love to hear about it.

item.title: We Built This City - 85 Vintage Images of 1980s Fashions!
item.description:
Beach models
Somewhere in Europe, 1987 (photo by Sergio Purtell)
Duran Duran's Nick Rhodes married Julie Ann Friedman in 1984 (divorced 1992)
New Romantics
1986
1984 (photo by Baldwin Lee)
Landers Sisters # 1 - for the uninitiated, Audrey (on left) and Judy Landers were everywhere in the 80s. They modeled, sang and acted.
Metropolis, Hollywood, CA, 1984 (photo by Robert Landau)
Dolly Parton, Emmylou Harris and Linda Ronstadt, 1987 (photo by Robert Blakeman)
Madonna filming Borderline video, Los Angeles, CA, 1984
North Wood High School students showing style, Nappanee, IN, 1983
1987
1985 douches - those white pants on the right are super see through so be careful choosing your undies!
Woman at home after workout, Malibu, CA, 1987 (phto by Joel Sternfeld)
Cigarette girl at the club, 1984 (photo by Ronnie Ginnever)
Her date is clearly a fan of the Stray Cats
Early Salt n Pepa, 1980
Landers Sisters # 2
Largest bow of all time, wow! NYC, 1984 (photo by Richard Sandler)
1986
Looks like they are playing quarters, Lowenbrau in the back (photo by Sergio Purtell)
Spring break, Galveston, TX, 1988
These two are both 15. Cambridge Rindge and Latin School, Cambridge, MA, 1983 (photo by Olive Pierce)
Bikini girls at Jones Beach, NY, 1988 (photo by Joseph Szabo)
Teen fashion in the 1987 Alameda High School yearbook, Alameda, CA
Landers Sisters # 3
Eddie Van Halen and Valerie Bertinelli, 1985
1987
Model Jerry Hall, 1985
These guys were in the hallway of every 80s high school
1986
Westwood Mall, Michigan, early 1980s
Princess Di in red - red pantyhose aren't good for anyone, no matter the decade, 1986
1984
1984 at the mall
1983 office workers
80s couple (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Landers Sisters # 4
The office, 1980s - the flowers are an interesting touch (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
My eyes are up here, pal
German model
1986
1980s men style
Michael Jackson and Ola Ray making the Thriller video, 1983
Early 80s concert tailgate
Washington DC teens, 1985
More New Romantics, early 80s
80s office ladies with their sneakers (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Pacha Club, Ibiza, Spain, 1985
The Orchids, 1980
Young man from Brooklyn, NYC - love his buttons! 1988 (photo by Dawoud Bey)
Finely dressed at the clam bar, 1988 (photo by Mary Ellen Mark)
Landers Sisters # 5
Hip hop group UTFO, Brooklyn, NYC, 1984 (photo by Janette Beckman)
Wall Street summer interns, NYC, 1986 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
The top and the Mom jeans don't go together very well. Whatever, it's Heather Locklear, right? 1980
Depeche Mode in 1981
1986 party
New Romantic at the Blitz club, London, 1980 (photo by Derek Ridgers)
Waiting behind the rope at Studio 54, 1981 (photo by Richard Sandler)
Model Pat Cleveland in dress by Marc Bouwer, NYC, 1982
Jessica at the Wag Club, London, 1983
80s model in red
The half shirts on guys.....meh.
Moms in knit sweaters and pink pearls
Human mannequin! New Jersey mall, 1980 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
1987
Boombox boys with sunglasses, NYC, 1983 (photo by Morris Engel)
1988
German model
High school smoking section!
Annabella Lwin of Bow Wow Wow, 1986
Brockton High School yearbook, Massachusetts, 1987
Landers Sisters # 6
1985
Pastel jumpsuits and big belts, 1985 - summer camp!
Three snow bunnies at Elmer's, Camelback, PA, 1986
Tuinol Barry, Chelsea, London, 1983 (photo by Derek Ridgers)
1986, matchy matchy
Actors Jami Gertz and Jason Patric, 1986
Phone call, 1987 (photo by Henry Wessel)
Designer Issey Miyake and model Kathy Ireland, 1985
McDonald's crew, 1983
Rap duo Double Destiny (photo by Janette Beckman)
Lady shopping with her rabbit, Santa Monica, CA, 1988 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)

item.title: Perseverance & Ingenuity
item.description: The most awesome selfie in the Solar System. Let's put Imgur to the test.
item.dc:creator: DisconnectedDan
